description: Style NotePure police DNA homme, for men, comes in a black flacon with the same shape, covered with leather.  Product DetailsTop notes of the version for men surprise with a union of citruses (Sicilian lemon), spices (cardamom, nutmeg), woody notes of cedar and aromatic bay leaves. A heart features amber, cashmere, lavender and absynth, while a base enriches the composition with patchouli, sandalwood, vetiver, tonka, incense and orange blossomCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSizeQuantity: 75 ml
